ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patents" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the patent was filed */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of patent */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the patent */,
  "patent_number" TEXT /* Patent number assigned by the patent office */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the patent */,
  "application_number" TEXT /* Application number assigned by the patent office */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the patent was filed */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the patent expires */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date when the patent was granted */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the patent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patent */,
  "claims" TEXT /* Claims of the patent */,
  "inventors" TEXT /* Inventors of the patent */,
  "assignees" TEXT /* Assignees of the patent */,
  "lawyers" TEXT /* Lawyers representing the patent */,
  "patent_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patent agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES patent_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES patent_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_patent_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_agent_id") REFERENCES patent_agents ("patent_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the patent type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patent type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the patent status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patent status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_agents" (
  "patent_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent agent */,
  "patent_agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the patent agent */,
  "patent_agent_company" TEXT /* Company of the patent agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent family */,
  "parent_patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent patent */,
  "child_patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child patent */,
  "family_type" TEXT /* Type of the patent family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_families_child_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_families_parent_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent that changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change occurred */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_history_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lawyer, business development) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patent */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patent was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expiration_dates" (
  "expiration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiration event */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent that expires */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the patent expires */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when a notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expiration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expiration_dates_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee payment */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent for which the fee was paid */,
  "fee_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee was due */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_fees_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent being tracked */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., number of patents granted, pending) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., patent expiration, fee due) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)
